name: UNC2814
brief: In GTIG's May 2026 tracker, UNC2814 used "expert persona" prompting — directing Gemini to act as a senior security auditor / C-C++ binary security expert — to drive vulnerability research on embedded devices (router firmware, hunting pre-auth RCE). GTIG
ttpMd:
**LLM-assisted vulnerability research** T1588.006 - Obtain Capabilities: Vulnerabilities

T1587.004 - Develop Capabilities: Exploits
